# Young Contractors Ltd - Full Site Content

> Premium tiling and stone worktop specialists serving London's most prestigious residential and commercial developments.

## About

At Young Contractors Ltd, we pride ourselves on being a leading tiling company that specialises in the supply and installation of natural stone, porcelain, large-format tiles, and mosaic wall/floor tiling. We also offer bespoke stone worktops in the residential, retail, leisure, and commercial sectors. With a commitment to excellence, we offer comprehensive supply and installation services designed to meet the unique needs of each of our clients.

## Our Approach

### Relationships First
We believe in building strong, lasting relationships with our clients. Your satisfaction is our top priority, and we strive to exceed your expectations in every project.

### Expert Craftsmanship
Our experienced craftsmen are meticulous in their work, delivering precise and immaculate results that stand the test of time.

### High-Quality Service
We are dedicated to providing quick, high-quality service. Our skilled team uses only the best materials and techniques to ensure a high-end finish on every job.

### Commercially Competitive
Leveraging our extensive industry connections, we are in a favourable position to offer our clients the best value and superior service.

### Comprehensive Solutions
From the initial consultation to the final installation, we handle every aspect of your tiling and fabrication needs, ensuring a seamless and hassle-free experience.

## Services

### Tiling Solutions

**Residential Tiling:** Transform your project with our expert tiling services, whether it's for a new bathroom, kitchen, or any other living space.

**Retail Spaces:** Create stunning retail environments that attract customers and enhance your brand with our custom tiling solutions.

**Leisure Facilities:** Enhance the aesthetic appeal and functionality of your leisure spaces with our durable and stylish tiles.

**Commercial Properties:** Optimise your commercial spaces with our high-quality tiling that combines beauty with practicality, ensuring cost-effectiveness and efficiency.

**Wet Room Systems:** Using top-of-the-range materials, waterproofing your bathroom correctly is vital to a long-lasting area.

**Tiled Pedestal System:** Tiled terraces and balconies are an ever-present requirement. We can use our metal frame system or pedestals to create your perfect space.

### Fabrication Services

**Kitchen Tops, Splashbacks & Bespoke Items:** From templating to installation, we deliver bespoke kitchen tops and splashbacks that are both functional and beautiful.

**Vanity Tops:** Add a touch of elegance to your bathrooms with our custom-made vanity tops, designed to meet your specific preferences.

### Repair & Maintenance

From natural stone repairs to polishing and anti-slip application, we offer services to help maintain or bring back your area to a near-new finish.

- Client: IJM Land
- Units: 263
- Scope: Bathroom, Communal, Lobby, Amenity Tiling, Kitchen & Vanity Top Installation

- Scope: Bathroom, Communal, Lobby, Leisure Centre, Amenity Tiling, Kitchen & Vanity Top Install

- Units: 299
- Scope: Bathroom, Communal, Lobby, Amenity Tiling

- Client: Greycoat
- Scope: Nine Floor Office Refurb - Lobby, WC, Toilets, Staff Changing Room Tiling

### Riverstone Fulham
- Client: Riverstone Living
- Units: 160
- Scope: Bathroom, Communal, Lobby, Tiling, Balcony Tiling & Frame Install

## FAQ

**What areas do you cover?**
We primarily work across London and the South East, covering residential and commercial developments. For larger projects, we're happy to discuss requirements outside of these areas.

**What types of tiling do you offer?**
We specialise in the supply and installation of natural stone, porcelain, large-format tiles, and mosaic wall/floor tiling. We also handle wet room waterproofing systems, tiled pedestal systems for balconies and terraces, and bespoke stone worktops.

**Do you provide free quotes?**
Yes, we offer free consultations and quotes for all projects. Contact us with your project details and we'll arrange a time to discuss your requirements.

**How long does a typical project take?**
Project timelines vary depending on the size and complexity of the work. A single bathroom may take a few days, while a large multi-unit residential development can span several months. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the quotation stage.

**What materials do you work with?**
We work with a wide range of premium materials including natural stone, porcelain, ceramic, marble, granite, and quartz. We source materials from leading suppliers to ensure the highest quality finish.

**Are you certified and insured?**
Yes, we are proud members of The Tile Association and hold all necessary insurance and certifications for the work we undertake. We are committed to maintaining the highest industry standards.
